title: Simple Dynamic Light
description: Simple plugin that will add Dynamic Light to your server
body:
# Simple Dynamic Light
## Plugin commands:
- /dynlight reload - Reload plugin
- /dynlight on - Turn on dynamic light
- /dynlight off - Turn off dynamic light
## You can config:
- Blocks that emit light and its power from 1 to 15
- Update interval
## Additional informations:
- Plugin will create light that will follow you and any other player on server even in vanilla minecraft! You can have your torch in right as well as in left hand or you can drop it on ground and it will emit light
- The turn on and off functions only works for you!
- Yes you can make dirt or any other block emit light when in your hand or when droped
- **To avoid any bugs I'l suggest to turn off plugin with command when using shaders or any other dynamic light mod**
